stemHtml: Refer to figure or CAP 696 File. An aeroplane fitted with 106 passenger seats operates a holiday charter flight within the European region. For this flight, the passengers on board are 46 males, 38 females, 12 children, 5 infants (taking the same seat with their parents) and 62 checked baggage. The Operator uses standard masses for passengers (all adults) and checked baggage and there are no cargo items in the holds. What is the Traffic Load of this flight?
